ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the district */,
  "cases_per_100k" INTEGER /* Number of cases per 100,000 population */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the district data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the case is located */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the patient (e.g., 0-17, 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., confirmed, recovered, deceased) */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was confirmed */,
  "symptoms_onset_date" TEXT /* Date when symptoms first appeared */,
  "test_result_date" TEXT /* Date when the test result was confirmed */,
  "case_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the case (e.g., mild, severe, critical) */,
  "isolation_status" TEXT /* Current isolation status (e.g., hospitalized, home isolation, no isolation) */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient recovered */,
  "deceased_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient deceased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalizations" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being hospitalized */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge (if applicable) */,
  "bed_type" TEXT /* Type of bed (e.g., general, ICU) */,
  "ventilator_use" INTEGER /* Indicates if a ventilator was used */,
  "admitted_by" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare professional who admitted the patient */,
  "discharge_reason" TEXT /* Reason for discharge (e.g., recovery, transfer, deceased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_hospital_name FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_name") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "home_isolations" (
  "isolation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each home isolation */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being isolated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the isolation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the isolation */,
  "monitoring_by" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare professional monitoring the isolation */,
  "checkup_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of checkups (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "isolation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for home isolation (e.g., mild symptoms, lack of hospital beds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isolation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_home_isolations_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "beds_available" INTEGER /* Number of beds available */,
  "icu_capacity" INTEGER /* ICU capacity */,
  "ventilators_available" INTEGER /* Number of ventilators available */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the hospital is located */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the hospital */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the hospital */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the hospital data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, policymaker, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_cases" (
  "district_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district case */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the case count */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations */,
  "home_isolations" INTEGER /* Number of home isolations */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the given date */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases on the given date */,
  "deceased_cases" INTEGER /* Number of deceased cases on the given date */,
  "vaccinated_population" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinated individuals in the district */,
  "vaccination_coverage" REAL /* Vaccination coverage rate in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_cases_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_severity" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the case (e.g., mild, severe, critical) */,
  "severity_description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  "severity_updated_date" TEXT /* Last date the severity level was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_severity_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 0-17, 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the age group data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
